title: Descended Angel
description: A mod that adds angelic items into the game, allowing you to experience playing as an Angel descended into the Minecraft World.
body:
This is a mod that adds Halos and Wings to the game, which grant buffs to the player while being worn. 

The Halos are split into **9 different tiers** -> _Angel, Archangel, Principality, Power, Virtue, Dominion, Cherubim, Throne and Seraphim_. The higher the tier, the greater the buffs, and the more costly the recipe.

It is recommended to play the mod with JEI, to see the custom recipes. To begin using the mod, you craft an Artificial Angel Feather using Drops of the Void, which you get from Void Touched mobs. Afterwards, locate an structure which contains an Altar, which will allow you to craft an Angel Halo.

---

Work-In-Progress Mod Wiki -> [Descended Angel Wiki](https://github.com/mjissoy/Forge-Descended-Angel-1.20.X/wiki)

A small discord to communicate with me :) -> [Descended Discord](https://discord.gg/3hApb5naP2)
